vehicle.label: 6-DOF Industrial Arm
vehicle.desc: 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm, 5kg payload, 600mm reach

parts.label: Base Joint (J1)
parts.spec: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

parts.label: Shoulder Joint (J2)
parts.spec: Shoulder pitch joint J2, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 80Nm, cable routing through center bore

parts.label: Upper Arm (Link 2-3)
parts.spec: Upper arm link, 300mm length, hollow tube with cable conduit, lightweight Al 7075

parts.label: Elbow Joint (J3)
parts.spec: Elbow pitch joint J3, +-150deg, cycloidal reducer, 50Nm, encoder dual-stack

parts.label: Forearm + Wrist (J4)
parts.spec: Forearm with wrist roll J4, 250mm length, +-360deg continuous, slip ring for power/signal

parts.label: Wrist Pitch (J5)
parts.spec: Wrist pitch joint J5, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 20Nm, compact form factor

parts.label: Wrist Roll (J6)
parts.spec: Wrist final roll joint J6, +-360deg, harmonic drive, 10Nm, ISO 9409-1 50mm tool flange

parts.label: Tool Flange + Changer
parts.spec: Tool changer master plate at J6 end, pneumatic locking, 4 utility ports

parts.label: Cable Management Spine
parts.spec: External cable carrier from base to wrist, drag chain or spiral, signal + power + pneumatic

parts.label: Replaceable Motor Module Set
parts.spec: Actuation_motors closure module: replaceable motor_module cartridges for J1-J6, fastener_access, coupling_dummy, insert/washer preload pads, torque_Nm intent labels

parts.label: Encoder Cover + Sensing Set
parts.spec: Sensing_encoders closure module: encoder_pocket and encoder_cover at each joint, index marks, cable exit strain relief, inspection labels

parts.label: Drive Electronics Bay
parts.spec: Drive_electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window

verify.value: All required features are present in part_tree/geometry_ops.
verify.rule: Each required evidence_feature must appear in part_tree/geometry_ops.

verify.value: Estimated mass is within budget.
verify.rule: cad_brief.mass_est_g must be a numeric grams value.

verify.value: P0 internal_feature_targets appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets.
verify.rule: P0 lists features but geometry_ops are generic boxes at the origin.

verify.value: Adjacent interfaces are reciprocal with exact neighboring subsystem labels.
verify.rule: name exact neighboring subsystem labels when they mate, and choose connection_type + DOF + clearance_mm + required_feature so the neighbor can declare the same joint family back.

verify.value: Critical joints state locking method and torque/preload intent.
verify.rule: Critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.

verify.value: Boundary conditions are defined with fixture_points, thermal_zones, and pressure_faces.
verify.rule: verify must include a boundary_conditions object with fixture_points, thermal_zones, and pressure_faces.

risk.desc: Potential for thermal stress due to heat dissipation from motor to base plate.
risk.mit: Include thermal management features such as cooling fins or heat sinks.

risk.desc: Risk of cable strain due to improper routing or inadequate strain relief.
risk.mit: Ensure all cable exits have strain relief geometry and routing respects minimum bend radius.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to complex bolt patterns.
risk.mit: Provide clear assembly instructions and ensure alignment tools are used during assembly.

risk.desc: Risk of particle contamination during assembly due to open interfaces.
risk.mit: Implement sealing and shielding measures for all open interfaces.

risk.desc: Potential for ESD damage due to lack of ESD-safe materials or coatings.
risk.mit: Ensure all materials and coatings are ESD-safe and follow ESD handling procedures.

print_profile.print_strategy: CNC milling followed by LPBF for complex internal features

risk.mit: Perform load testing to 120% of rated torque to ensure load capacity.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Elbow pitch joint, +-150deg, cycloidal reducer, 50Nm, encoder dual-stack

physics_paths.description: Payload forces are transmitted through the arm links to the elbow joint reducer.
Heat generated by the motor is dissipated through the housing to the environment.
Rotational motion from the actuator is transmitted to the shaft, driving the cycloidal reducer.
Position data from the encoder is transmitted to the controller via a harness.
Human maintenance personnel access the joint for inspection and servicing.

manufacturing_strategy.datum: Primary locating faces and rail guides
manufacturing_strategy.tolerance: H7/h6 fit class for sliding interfaces, LC2 for bolted connections
manufacturing_strategy.support: Support structures for LPBF, orientation for minimal support
manufacturing_strategy.inspection: Coordinate measuring machine (CMM) for dimensional accuracy
